commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: run obdfilter-survey to verify LDEV-99
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: run obdfilter-survey to verify LDEV-99

This is for test only

envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el6 ossdistro=el6.6 mdsdistro=el6.6 clientarch=x86_64 \
